name: XOYO and Sneak Rave
content: I was visiting London around the beginning of the DnB/Jungle revival in mid-2024, and I thought it would be appropriate to go to a British rave to better understand the culture that produced the music I was listening to at the time. Apparently the rave only admits people in groups, and does not admit singles (like me). The bouncer was polite about it, and rules are rules, but it was still a bit of a bummer. While I was sitting on a fence about a block from the venue pondering where else I could go that night, I was approached by a young lad trying to sell me something. He had been tasked with advertising the rave I had just been turned away from. I tried explaining my situation to him, but to no avail; he was dead set on pushing an advertisement flyer into my hands, and I eventually realized it would just be easier to take the flyer and depart the scene. I then went to a Salsa bar in Soho, met some nice people including a German metalhead We commiserated about the both of us feeling awkwardly out of place in a salsa bar, got drunk, drained my phone battery, and learned (a little too late) that the tube closed an hour before I started my journey home.
